name: mythic-index-mcp
description: MTG card prices, deck analysis, and investment intelligence — 19 tools.
long_description: Magic: The Gathering card pricing, deck cost analysis, sealed-product EV, Reserved List tracking, cross-vendor arbitrage, and investment signals — powered by live data from 5 vendors across 99K+ cards via the Mythic Index API. 19 read-only tools.

tools.name: search_cards
tools.description: Fuzzy card name search — handles typos and partial names

tools.name: find_cards
tools.description: Find cards by ability text, type, color, CMC, price, format, Reserved List

tools.name: browse_cards
tools.description: Browse cards by price, name, or newest sets

tools.name: list_sets
tools.description: List and search all MTG sets

tools.name: get_set_stats
tools.description: Set statistics: rarity, avg price, total value, top cards

tools.name: get_sealed_ev
tools.description: Expected-value breakdown for a sealed product

tools.name: top_movers
tools.description: Biggest price gains and drops over a period

tools.name: price_deck
tools.description: Price a decklist: cost, vendors, mana curve, legality, swaps

tools.name: suggest_budget_alternatives
tools.description: Cheaper cards with similar type and CMC

tools.name: analyze_mana_curve
tools.description: Mana curve, land count, color source requirements

tools.name: find_cards_by_role
tools.description: Find cards by role: removal, ramp, draw, burn, counter, and more
